measures.name: Last Batch Run Time
measures.expression:
VAR LatestSuccessBatch = 
    CALCULATE(
        MAX('audit_batch_log'[session_end]),
        'audit_batch_log'[batch_status] = "Succeeded"
    )
    
RETURN
    IF(
        ISBLANK(LatestSuccessBatch),
        "No Successful Runs",
        FORMAT(LatestSuccessBatch, "dd-MMM-yyyy HH:mm:ss")
    )

measures.name: Policies YoY % Growth
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentPolicies = DISTINCTCOUNT('factpolicy'[policy_info_key])

VAR LastYearPolicies = 
    CALCULATE(
        DISTINCTCOUNT('factpolicy'[policy_info_key]),
        SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR('dimdate'[full_date])
    )

RETURN
    DIVIDE(
        CurrentPolicies - LastYearPolicies,
        LastYearPolicies,
        BLANK()
    )
